Instill
★GitHub
Open source · BYOK · Self-hosted

Your own AI engineering platform

Describe what you want to build. Instill provisions repos, generates code, and deploys to production — all on your own infrastructure with your own keys.

Get StartedTry Demo

No terminal required. Demo runs instantly — no keys needed.

Four steps to your own platform

1/4

Connect GitHub

One-click OAuth

2/4

Connect Vercel

Paste your token

3/4

Deploy API

Auto-provisioned on Fly.io

4/4

You're live

Start building

Just describe it. We handle the rest.

No YAML required. Just tell Instill what you want to build.

Build me a plus-size fashion store for Poland with BLIK payments

⚡

Analyzing intent... Got it. I'll set up `curvy-poland` — a Next.js storefront with Shopify backend, BLIK + Przelewy24 payments, size guide XL–6XL, and free shipping threshold at 200 zł.

⚡

Generating project files, creating GitHub repo, configuring Vercel deploy...

⚡

✅ Live at curvy-poland.vercel.app — 3m 47s total

See the generated config
project: curvy-poland
stack: nextjs
market: PL
features:
  - ecommerce-storefront
  - size-guide-xl-6xl
  - blik-payments
  - free-shipping-threshold
tools:
  - Shopify
  - Stripe

Ready to build?

Open source. Bring your own keys. Deploy in minutes.
